tagline: You can now use Private Link to privately connect to Databricks account level resources, such as the account console, through a VPC interface endpoint instead of the public internet.
what_it_does: You can now use Private Link to privately connect to Databricks account level resources, such as the account console, through a VPC interface endpoint instead of the public internet. Preview Inbound Private Link for account level resources is in Beta. This feature gives users in your AWS VPCs or on premises networks private access to Databricks account level resources, including the account console and account level Genie.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
key_takeaway: You can now use Private Link to privately connect to Databricks account level resources, such as the account console, through a VPC interface endpoint instead of the public internet.
